name: ng-input-group
title: Input Group (Angular)
description: Composable input layout - wraps Input or Textarea with inline / block addons (icons, buttons, kbd hints). Drives focus + invalid + disabled states from the inner control. Mirrors React InputGroup from @gremorie/rx-forms.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-input-group.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
